title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Runwal Group

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Runwal Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Runwal Group in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Runwal Group:
Runwal Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Runwal Group!
